title: Invariant substrate Phase 1 landed (Chrysalis Foundation)
body: Shipped CFS-001/002/003/003a v1: migration 20260703200000_invariant_substrate.sql (ontology_classes, invariants w/ Invariant Standing, invariant_contexts, invariant_edges; recreates activity_receipts action_type CHECK — also restores 4 types dropped by 20260624200000), services/invariants/ (store/graph/comparison/lifecycle — the Invariant Service, spine-discipline), spine-gated routes /api/invariants{,/graph,/[id]/advance} + /api/ontology, receipt union + DVN ANCHORABLE additions (invariant_validated/canonized/superseded), ingest script for the 59-invariant Appendix A seed, 12 passing canary tests. Touching: services/invariants/, services/receipts/activityReceiptService.ts, services/dvn/activityReceiptDvnPipeline.ts (action types only), app/api/invariants/, app/api/ontology/, types/invariants.ts. Operator must apply the migration + run scripts/ingest-canonical-invariants.mjs.
